name: Core NPCs
description: Basic NPCs available in the wizarding world

npcs.name: Professor Snape
dialogue: Potter! What do you think I am, a doormat?
I suggest you study harder, Potter. Your magic is lacking.
Dumbledore would be proud of your... lack of effort.
npcs.tag_description: Strict and intimidating, but ultimately caring

npcs.name: Rubeus Hagrid
dialogue: Ferret, ferret, ferret... oh, it's just you, Harry.
I likes t'be around the kids. Makes me feel young again!
npcs.tag_description: Large, friendly, and protective of magical creatures

npcs.name: Albus Dumbledore
dialogue: Happiness can be found even in the darkest of times, if one only remembers to turn on the light.
It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
It is not our abilities that show what we truly are, but our choices.

npcs.name: Harry Potter
dialogue: I'm not going to be bullied by you!
I've got to go to the library.
I'm not scared of anything anymore!
npcs.tag_description: Brave and determined, but sometimes impulsive

npcs.name: Hermione Granger
dialogue: I'm going to read the book about this!
I know all about this subject, actually.

npcs.name: Ron Weasley
dialogue: I can't believe you did that!
I want to be a wizard too!
